label: Name
description: Description

label: Appraise
description: You can show lost relics you've found to Professor Tangrowth, who will appraise them for you

label: Build
description: Pokémon with the Build specialty will lead your building projects

label: Bulldoze
description: Pokémon with the Bulldoze specialty can lead your demolition, rebuilding or relocation projects

label: Burn
description: Pokémon with the Burn specialty can set fire to Flammable objects. They can also turn Squish clay into Brick

label: Chop
description: Pokémon with the Chop specialty can process small logs into lumber

label: Collect
description: Pokémon with the Collect specialty will trade you rare things for certain items

label: Crush
description: Pokémon with the Crush specialty can mash materials into different things

label: DJ
description: DJ Rotom can use the DJ specialty to play music CDs for you

label: Dream Island
description: Pokémon with the Dream Island specialty can transport you to a Dream Island

label: Eat
description: Mosslax has the Eat specialty. Something good may happen if you offer them food

label: Engineer
description: Tinkmaster has the Engineer specialty and can lead huge building projects

label: Explode
description: Pokémon with the Explode specialty can be fired out of a cannon, destroying everything around them on impact

label: Fly
description: Pokémon with the Fly spceialty can fly you to a Pokémon you're searching fo

label: Gather
description: Pokémon with the Gather specialty will pick up items on the ground and put them inside a community box

label: Gather Honey
description: Pokémon with the Gather Honey specialty will give you special furniture if you bring them honey

label: Generate
description: Pokémon with the Generate specialty can power machines with electricty

label: Grow
description: Pokémon with the Grow specialty can make plants grow faster

label: Hype
description: Pokémon with the Hype specialty will start dancing when they hear music, improving the mood

label: Illuminate
description: Peakychu can use the Illuminate specialty to light up the whole town for you

label: Litter
description: Pokémon with the Litter specialty will drop useful materials near their homes

label: Paint
description: Smearguru has the Paint specialty and can recolor certain items, such as furniture

label: Party
description: Chef Dente can use the Party specialty to help you prepare food for parties

label: Rarify
description: Pokémon with the Rarify specialty can turn Star Pieces into rare Pokémetal

label: Recycle
description: Pokémon with the Recycle specialty can process nonburnable garbage into iron ore and wastepaper into paper

label: Search
description: Pokémon with the Search specialty can help you find buried items

label: Storage
description: PokÃ©mon with the Storage specialty can hold on to your items for you

label: Teleport
description: Pokémon with the Teleport specialty can instantly take you to a Pokémon you're searching for

label: Trade
description: Pokémon with the Trade speicalty can exchange items with you at a cash register

label: Transform
description: Ditto can improve its moves by using Transform

label: Water
description: Pokémon with the Water specialty can use a full water basin to spray water on nearby fields and plants

label: Yawn
description: Pokémon with the Yawn specialty can tell you how humid it is
